# Vendored dependency

xterm.js 6.0.0 + addon-fit 0.11.0 + addon-search 0.16.0 (MIT), UMD builds + CSS.
Powers the Serial Monitor: real ANSI colorization, selection/copy, fit-to-window,
and in-buffer search. Loaded as plain <script> tags → window.Terminal,
window.FitAddon.FitAddon, window.SearchAddon.SearchAddon. No CDN.
